name: Antivirus EDR Tampered
description: Detects attempts to disable or tamper with security software
query:
// Security Software Tampering
// AV/EDR disabled or tampered
events from endpoint
where event_type in ("av_disabled", "edr_tampered", "protection_disabled")
  or (process_name in ("MsMpEng.exe", "MsSense.exe") and event_type = "process_terminated")
group by hostname, username
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
